conversations.value: Explain what a hash map is in simple terms.
A hash map is a data structure that stores values by key, so you can look them up quickly instead of scanning a full list.
Use one when you need fast lookups, inserts, or updates by a unique key, like storing users by ID.
Write a short support reply telling a user their password reset link expires in 15 minutes.
Your password reset link will expire in 15 minutes, so please use it as soon as possible. If it expires, request a new one from the sign-in page.
Of course — your password reset link will stay active for 15 minutes. If it expires before you can use it, just request a new one from the sign-in page and you'll be back on track.
